characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Badass Adorable: They're both cute puppies that go on incredible adventures. Keets: These two pups have endless energy. Supporting Protagonist: They become this in Season 5, playing second fiddle to Buster, Leo, Roxy, and Nougat.

characters.name: Both Bingo & Rolly
characters.description: Badass Adorable: They're both cute puppies that go on incredible adventures. Keets: These two pups have endless energy. Supporting Protagonist: They become this in Season 5, playing second fiddle to Buster, Leo, Roxy, and Nougat.

characters.name: Bingo
characters.description: A blackish grayish pug with a blue lightning collar who is more mature than his twin brother Rolly. He is the leader of Rolly and himself. Bingo is always ready to go on missions with his brother to help someone in need. Catchphrase:"Rolly, you and I are going on a mission!""Really?" Used whenever Rolly repeatedly does something that slows down their mission."Time for Bingo to do his Thing-o!" "Rolly, you and I are going on a mission!" "Really?" Used whenever Rolly repeatedly does something that slows down their mission. "Time for Bingo to do his Thing-o!"

characters.name: Rolly
characters.description: A fawn pug with a red collar with a gold bone on it. He isn't as smart as Bingo but is very silly. He is Bingo's twin brother. Rolly loves to chew on everything he can find and it's a bad habit. Oral Fixation: Hereallylikes to chew on random objects. Prone to Tears: This happened to him exclusively in Season 5 as part of hisFlanderizationwhenever he thinks he, Bingo, and whoever's with them have failed their mission, a stark contrast to how Rolly was more disappointed when thinking about this in the earlier seasons. Stout Strength: He is noticeably pudgier then Bingo, but also stronger. All too often, the duo call upon his "Rolly power" to get the job done. Tunnel King: "Pyramid Scheme" shows him digging long tunnels with ease, and even uncovering the buried pyramids in barely any time at all.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: The owner of Bingo, Rolly, Hissy, and A.R.F. He works as an industrial designer/product designer a.k.a. an "inventor." In Season 2, Bob has also modified the fence between his and Chloe's house, so that Keia can play with Bingo, Rolly, and Hissy and they can all visit each other's homes. In addition, Bob has also made a new collar for Keia, which she wears during missions with Bingo and Rolly. Affectionate Nickname: His sister Bonnie calls him "Bobby". Catchphrase:"Great gears!""Suffering side orders of seaweed salad!" "Suffering side orders of seaweed salad!" Gadgeteer Genius: He loves to invent and bulid various gadgets for his pets.

characters.name: Hissy
characters.description: Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: She is a purple cat with a pink tuft of fur on her head. Cats Are Snarkers: For example, in "A.R.F.", Rolly is catapulted into the air, and lands the couch. Hissy's response is "How was your flight?" Cats Hate Water: She isNOTa fan of water and hates getting wet. However in the Season 5 episode "Riding in Ice Cream Trucks with Pups", after getting splashed by Leo, she stated that it feels good on her. At the end of the same episode, she joins with the other pets in the pool stating that cats like to get cooled off. Cool Big Sis: Hissy to Bingo and Rolly. They look up to her, often telling her about their adventures, and she doesn't mind joining on on their games (when she's not sleeping, of course). Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Downplayed. She's not particularly mean or selfish, but she is snarky and prefers to keep to herself. With that said though, she still deeply cares about Bob and the pups.

characters.name: A.R.F.
characters.description: A robotic dog that Bob invented. He first appears in the episode "A.R.F." and was updated by Bob in "Go Dog Go." He always refers to himself in third person in every episode with the exception of "Go Dog Go" and "How ARF Got His Bark Back." Do-Anything Robot: He has a number of built-in tools, such as a vacuum, drier, even a sidecar, with Bob adding new features on a regular basis. Fun with Acronyms:Auto-DoggyRobotFriend. Mr. Exposition: He often provides Bingo and Rolly with information regarding the locations they're going to. Third-Person Person: He never uses the word "I", instead always calling himself "A.R.F."

characters.name: Keia
characters.description: A puppy that made her debut in Season 2. A new puppy owned by Bob's next door neighbors, Chloe and her mother. Keia also becomes close friends with Bingo, Rolly and Hissy ever since she met them. She is also known for wearing a turquoise colored long-sleeved shirt and wearing a pink collar with a gold star on it. She first appeared in the Season 2 Premiere, "A New Pup in Town." Demoted to Extra: She was kicked to the curb along with Lollie in Season 5 to focus on the new characters. Gadgeteer Genius: Most notably in "20,000 Leagues Under The Lake", when she single-handedly buildsan entire submarine. Genki Girl: Extremely energetic and fun-loving. Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal: Keia wears a blue sweater.

characters.name: Cupcake
characters.description: Actor Allusion: Jill Talley was another female dog in another educational puppy based cartoon. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: She's a pink Maltese. Friendly Enemy: Despite antagonizing the titular puppies most of the time, she sometimes hangs out and plays with them, such as in thePlaytime with Puppy Dog Palsshort "Puppy Pool Party". Jerk with a Heart of Gold: She may be mean to others, but she occasionally shows her better side. Especially noticeable in "I Heart Rufus". Sitcom Arch-Nemesis: To Bingo and Rolly. Her relationship with them becomes better in season 2, though.

characters.name: Rufus
characters.description: The Unintelligible: Most of his dialogue comprises of mumbling.

characters.name: Frank and Esther Exposition
characters.description: The Dividual: They're almost never seen apart. Mr. Exposition:As their surname suggests, when they appear onscreen, they'll most likely talk about the things that puppies (and the viewers) need to know.

characters.name: Bulworth
characters.description: The local junkyard dog. A Day in the Limelight: In "The House That Bulworth Built" and "Pop's Promise". Cool Old Guy: The pups look up to him, often going to him for advice. Chaste Toons: He has a niece, Sydney, but no mention of Sydney's parents are ever made. Down in the Dumps: Where Bulworth lives.

characters.name: Johnathan
characters.description: Bingo and Rolly's wisecracking seagull friend. Rhymes on a Dime: Most of his dialogue is spoken in rhyme. Out of Focus: He suffers from this from season 2 onwards, getting fewer and fewer appearances.

characters.name: Chloe
characters.description: A little girl who is Bob's neighbor. As of Season 2, Chloe and her mother are the owners of Keia, a new puppy who also becomes best friends with Bob's pugs. Demoted to Extra: Was a major recurring character in the first two seasons, but started to fade into the background in the show's later years, to the point of only having one speaking appearance in Season 5 (Riding In Ice Cream Trucks With Pups). Vague Age: While her age is never mentioned, it is presumed by her height and voice that she is anywhere between 6-9 years old.

characters.name: Strider the Sheepdog
characters.description: Motor Mouth: She has a tendancy to speak really fast.

characters.name: Hedgie
characters.description: A brown hedgehog who is great friends with Bingo and Rolly and he gives great advice. You Don't Look Like You: His character model got a redesign for season two, giving him less skinny arms, and making his fur a darker brown.

characters.name: Boss
characters.description: A guard dog-in-training, who sometimes helps out Bingo and Rolly. Big Shadow, Little Creature: He often invokes this, appearing to be a big, scary-looking dog before emerging as he really is. The Klutz: He is more than a little clumsy.

characters.name: Sidney
characters.description: Fangirl: Of Bingo and Rolly. Having heard all about them from her uncle, she isveryexcited to meet them for the first time in "Bob's Birthday Wish". I Always Wanted to Say That: In "20,000 Leagues Under The Lake", she uses Bingo and Rolly's "Let's puppy dog do this" line, then immediatelysqueesthat she's always wanted to say it. Parental Abandonment: Her parents (one of them being the sibling of Bulworth) are never seen or mentioned.

characters.name: Olivia
characters.description: Cute Mute: As a fish, she cannot speak, and in her first appearance, her new family fauns over how adorable she is.

characters.name: Lollie
characters.description: A black and white Cavalier King Charles female puppy wearing a green collar whose back legs are paralyzed, as first seen in "Adopt-a-Palooza". Ascended Extra: She had only two appearances in Season 2, but become a major recurring character in Seasons 3 and 4. Demoted to Extra: In Season 5, despite being Bingo and Rolly's sister, Lollie was kicked to the curb along with Keia to focus on the new characters. Her screentime increased again in the final portion of that season. Genki Girl: Not to the same extent as Keia, but she is very energetic and loves having fun. Hidden Depths: In "The Naptime Chronicles", she mentions that listening to rock music helps her sleep.

characters.name: Ana
characters.description: Lollie's owner and Bob's love interest and later wife, first seen in "Adopt-a-Palooza". She works at Puppy Playcare, a pet grooming/daycare facility. She and Bob get engaged in "Under Antarctic Lights", and are married in "Bob's and Ana's Wedding". Catchphrase: "Yips and wiggles!" Meet Cute: She first meets Bob when the two bump into each other, getting tangled up in Bingo, Rolly and Keia's leashes. For added cuteness, they keep saying "excuse me." Nice Girl: A kind and caring person, as well as an animal lover. Happily Married: To Bob, as of the Season 4 finale.

characters.name: Cody
characters.description: Character Development: He is more confident and outgoing in his second appearance. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Disappeared after Season 3 and was never seen or mentioned again.

characters.name: Rosetta (Bob's mom)
characters.description: Cool Old Lady: She may be old, but she loves having fun with the pups. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Was never seen or mentioned in Season 5.

characters.name: Bonnie
characters.description: Adventurer Archaeologist: She travels all over the world, seeking rare artefacts. Catchphrase: "Sweet science!"

characters.name: Auggie & Mo
characters.description: Big Eater: Mo; In "The New Crew", he cleans out an entire bowl of kibble in seconds. Demoted to Extra: They only made few voiceless appearances in the background in Season 5. Family of Choice: Despite being different breeds of dog, they wholeheartedly consider themselves siblings. Fat and Skinny: Mo is the fat, while Auggie is the skinny. The Klutz: Auggie has long legs and big paws, a combination which often leads to her tripping herself up.

characters.name: Darius
characters.description: Child Prodigy: He attends a school for gifted children. Labcoat of Science and Medicine: His standard outfit includes a labcoat, showing off his intellect. Shrinking Violet: Initially shy around new people.

characters.name: Grace
characters.description: Manic Pixie Dream Girl: Serves as a platonic variant for Darius, helping him to open up more. Passionate Sports Girl: She loves practicing skateboard tricks. Tomboyish Ponytail: She wears her hair in this style.

characters.name: Buster & Leo
characters.description: Cone of Shame: Buster ends up having to wear one in "Buster Bluster". Hates Baths: In "Family Picture Day", Leonaturallystruggles with the idea of cleaning himself up for the family picture. Keet: Leo is highly energetic and excitable. The Klutz: Buster is this.

characters.name: Roxy & Nougat
characters.description: Housepet Pig: Nougat fits the bill. Tomboy and Girly Girl: Nougat is a rough-and-tumble girl who loves rolling in the mud, while Roxy enjoys tea parties and dressing up.

characters.name: Opera Singer
characters.description: Happy Birthday to You!: Sings it in "Bob's Birthday Wish", accidentally wakes Hissy up from her napcausing her to screechwhile doing this.
